case_title: BUENCONSEJO, LILIA vs. ROOKER, NORM et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUENCONSEJO, LILIA AS TO DEFENDANT ROOKER, NORM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-06-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-08-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-19-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-06-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-07-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE MAY RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-06-1996 CONTINUED FROM OCT-07-1996 TO NOV-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
